name: DARLING INGRED.INC.DL-,01
summary: DARLING INGREDIENTS INC. is a global developer and producer of sustainable natural ingredients from edible and inedible bio-nutrients, creating a wide range of ingredients and customized specialty solutions for customers in the pharmaceutical, food, pet food, feed, technical, fuel, bioenergy, and fertilizer industries. The company collects and transforms animal by-products into useable ingredients. Its headquarters are located in Irving, Texas.
